# NeuroHeart.AI

> AI-powered iOS app for stress management using real-time heart rate variability (HRV)
> biofeedback from Apple Watch, combined with AI-generated meditation and CBT-based therapy.

## What is NeuroHeart.AI
NeuroHeart.AI is an iOS app that uses real-time HRV data from Apple Watch to help users
manage stress, anxiety, and emotional well-being through AI-personalized interventions.

## Key Features
- Real-time HRV stress measurement from Apple Watch
- AI-generated personalized meditation
- CBT-based therapy tools
- Daily and weekly stress tracking

## Research
- Peer-reviewed research published at IEEE, FIE, and ASEE conferences

## Links
- Website: https://neuroheart.ai
- Contact: ai@neuroheart.ai
